channel.title: AI Tool Watch
channel.description: Recent AI feature launches and changes across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Grok, and Perplexity.

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has access (limited)
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has access (limited)

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has full browser access
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has full browser access

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has full access to all focus modes
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — availability table shows Free tier has full access to all focus modes

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Added missing Enterprise row to availability table (SSO, admin controls, custom limits)
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Added missing Enterprise row to availability table (SSO, admin controls, custom limits)

item.title: Microsoft Copilot — [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — free users have access with 15 AI credits/mo; data was internally inconsistent
item.description: Microsoft Copilot: [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — free users have access with 15 AI credits/mo; data was internally inconsistent

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Model updated from Gemini 2.5 Pro to Gemini 3.0 Pro for AI Pro tier
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Model updated from Gemini 2.5 Pro to Gemini 3.0 Pro for AI Pro tier

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Model updated from Gemini 2.5 Pro to Gemini 3.0 Pro
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Model updated from Gemini 2.5 Pro to Gemini 3.0 Pro

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano released: Mini available in ChatGPT (Free/Go via Thinking menu), API, and Codex; Nano is API-only; Mini $0.75/$4.50 per 1M tokens, Nano $0.20/$1.25 per 1M tokens; 400K context; vision support
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano released: Mini available in ChatGPT (Free/Go via Thinking menu), API, and Codex; Nano is API-only; Mini $0.75/$4.50 per 1M tokens, Nano $0.20/$1.25 per 1M tokens; 400K context; vision support

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Deep Connectors added (Google Drive, Gmail, DocuSign, FactSet); plugin marketplace launched; custom MCP connectors on paid plans
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Deep Connectors added (Google Drive, Gmail, DocuSign, FactSet); plugin marketplace launched; custom MCP connectors on paid plans

item.title: Claude — [Verified] API Memory Tool now available for developers (type: memory_20250818); 3-layer architecture: Chat Memory, CLAUDE.md, API Memory Tool
item.description: Claude: [Verified] API Memory Tool now available for developers (type: memory_20250818); 3-layer architecture: Chat Memory, CLAUDE.md, API Memory Tool

item.title: Microsoft Copilot — [Verified] Credits system replaced boosts (15-60 credits/month); Designer bot retired in Teams (Feb 27); model upgraded to GPT-Image-1.5
item.description: Microsoft Copilot: [Verified] Credits system replaced boosts (15-60 credits/month); Designer bot retired in Teams (Feb 27); model upgraded to GPT-Image-1.5

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Device support corrected to Pixel 10 series and Samsung Galaxy S26 series; regional availability updated to US and South Korea; supported apps listed
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Device support corrected to Pixel 10 series and Samsung Galaxy S26 series; regional availability updated to US and South Korea; supported apps listed

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Chrome side panel added (Jan 2026); model names updated to Gemini 3 Flash (free) and Gemini 3.1 Pro (paid)
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Chrome side panel added (Jan 2026); model names updated to Gemini 3 Flash (free) and Gemini 3.1 Pro (paid)

item.title: Grok — [Verified] Voice mode now free for all users on iOS and Android; 11 voice modes; TTS API launched (Mar 16); attachment/photo support in voice added; gating changed from paid to free
item.description: Grok: [Verified] Voice mode now free for all users on iOS and Android; 11 voice modes; TTS API launched (Mar 16); attachment/photo support in voice added; gating changed from paid to free

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Major expansion: Personal Computer (dedicated Mac mini, Max plan, waitlist); Computer for Enterprise (Slack/Snowflake/Salesforce, Enterprise plan); 4 platform APIs (Search, Agent, Embeddings, Sandbox); Samsung Galaxy S26 integration; section renamed to include "Perplexity Computer"
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Major expansion: Personal Computer (dedicated Mac mini, Max plan, waitlist); Computer for Enterprise (Slack/Snowflake/Salesforce, Enterprise plan); 4 platform APIs (Search, Agent, Embeddings, Sandbox); Samsung Galaxy S26 integration; section renamed to include "Perplexity Computer"

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Comet Enterprise launched (Mar 2026): managed browser with admin controls, MDM deployment, audit logs, CrowdStrike Falcon integration; iOS now available (Comet for iPhone); Enterprise Pro row added
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Comet Enterprise launched (Mar 2026): managed browser with admin controls, MDM deployment, audit logs, CrowdStrike Falcon integration; iOS now available (Comet for iPhone); Enterprise Pro row added

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] Added Team and Enterprise rows to availability table
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] Added Team and Enterprise rows to availability table

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] Temporary Free/Go promotional access; paid plan rate limits doubled
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] Temporary Free/Go promotional access; paid plan rate limits doubled

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] Terminal/CLI access added (Codex CLI on macOS/Linux/Windows WSL); Linux support corrected; sources expanded
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] Terminal/CLI access added (Codex CLI on macOS/Linux/Windows WSL); Linux support corrected; sources expanded

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Corrected gating from paid to free — availability table and external sources confirm free-tier access
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Corrected gating from paid to free — availability table and external sources confirm free-tier access

item.title: ChatGPT — Initial entry
item.description: ChatGPT: Initial entry

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] GPT-5.4 family released: Plus gets GPT-5.4 Thinking, Pro gets GPT-5.4 Pro; GPT-5.2 Thinking moved to Legacy Models (90-day retirement); 1M context in API; native computer use tool
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] GPT-5.4 family released: Plus gets GPT-5.4 Thinking, Pro gets GPT-5.4 Pro; GPT-5.2 Thinking moved to Legacy Models (90-day retirement); 1M context in API; native computer use tool

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] URL updated: support.google.com/gemini/answer/13695044 → gemini.google.com/extensions (old URL 404)
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] URL updated: support.google.com/gemini/answer/13695044 → gemini.google.com/extensions (old URL 404)

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] March 2026 beta rollout: Help me create (Docs), Fill with Gemini (Sheets), new slide creation (Slides), AI Overviews + Ask Gemini (Drive); AI Ultra tier added; Drive features US-only initially; English-only; full Slides deck gen coming soon
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] March 2026 beta rollout: Help me create (Docs), Fill with Gemini (Sheets), new slide creation (Slides), AI Overviews + Ask Gemini (Drive); AI Ultra tier added; Drive features US-only initially; English-only; full Slides deck gen coming soon

item.title: Gemini — Expanded to Samsung Galaxy S26 series
item.description: Gemini: Expanded to Samsung Galaxy S26 series

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] Windows note updated from "Expected late Feb 2026" to "Expected 2026 (not yet released)" — both models confirmed still macOS-only
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] Windows note updated from "Expected late Feb 2026" to "Expected 2026 (not yet released)" — both models confirmed still macOS-only

item.title: ChatGPT — Initial entry
item.description: ChatGPT: Initial entry

item.title: ChatGPT — Initial entry
item.description: ChatGPT: Initial entry

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — free users have full access; data was internally inconsistent
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Gating corrected from paid to free — free users have full access; data was internally inconsistent

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Free tier now includes prebuilt skills (confirmed in Sonnet 4.6 announcement); talking point corrected to match availability table
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Free tier now includes prebuilt skills (confirmed in Sonnet 4.6 announcement); talking point corrected to match availability table

item.title: Claude — Initial entry
item.description: Claude: Initial entry

item.title: Claude — Initial entry
item.description: Claude: Initial entry

item.title: Microsoft Copilot — [Verified] Multi-agent coordination added (agents can call other agents as tools); new agent surfaces: Outlook, OneDrive, Teams communities; PowerPoint agentic mode
item.description: Microsoft Copilot: [Verified] Multi-agent coordination added (agents can call other agents as tools); new agent surfaces: Outlook, OneDrive, Teams communities; PowerPoint agentic mode

item.title: Microsoft Copilot — [Verified] Federated connectors added: Notion, HubSpot, Linear, Intercom, Google Contacts, Google Calendar (live data via Researcher tool)
item.description: Microsoft Copilot: [Verified] Federated connectors added: Notion, HubSpot, Linear, Intercom, Google Contacts, Google Calendar (live data via Researcher tool)

item.title: Microsoft Copilot — Initial entry
item.description: Microsoft Copilot: Initial entry

item.description: Gemini: Initial entry

item.title: Gemini — Initial entry
item.description: Gemini: Initial entry

item.title: Grok — Initial entry
item.description: Grok: Initial entry

item.title: Grok — Initial entry
item.description: Grok: Initial entry

item.title: Perplexity — [Verified] Computer Voice Mode added (Mar 4, 2026); Max plan ($200/mo) only; hands-free voice commands for agentic Computer
item.description: Perplexity: [Verified] Computer Voice Mode added (Mar 4, 2026); Max plan ($200/mo) only; hands-free voice commands for agentic Computer

item.title: Perplexity — Initial entry
item.description: Perplexity: Initial entry

item.title: ChatGPT — Codex Security launched
item.description: ChatGPT: Codex Security launched

item.title: ChatGPT — [Verified] Regional section updated: EEA now available for basic agent tasks (rolled out late July 2025); Connector-based actions still restricted in EEA/CH/UK
item.description: ChatGPT: [Verified] Regional section updated: EEA now available for basic agent tasks (rolled out late July 2025); Connector-based actions still restricted in EEA/CH/UK

item.title: Claude — [Verified] Fixed broken URL: support.claude.com → support.anthropic.com
item.description: Claude: [Verified] Fixed broken URL: support.claude.com → support.anthropic.com

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Gating changed from paid to free; free tier now gets ~5 reports/month via Gemini Flash
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Gating changed from paid to free; free tier now gets ~5 reports/month via Gemini Flash

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Fixed broken URL (removed ?hl=en parameter)
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Fixed broken URL (removed ?hl=en parameter)

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Google One AI Premium renamed to Google AI Pro ($19.99/mo); Google AI Plus ($7.99/mo) and AI Ultra ($249.99/mo) added; AI Plus also includes Gemini Advanced
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Google One AI Premium renamed to Google AI Pro ($19.99/mo); Google AI Plus ($7.99/mo) and AI Ultra ($249.99/mo) added; AI Plus also includes Gemini Advanced

item.title: Gemini — [Verified] Gating changed from free to paid; Nano Banana 2 became default for all users (Feb 26, 2026); free users no longer get Nano Banana Pro
item.description: Gemini: [Verified] Gating changed from free to paid; Nano Banana 2 became default for all users (Feb 26, 2026); free users no longer get Nano Banana Pro

item.title: Gemini — Agentic App Actions (Android) launched
item.description: Gemini: Agentic App Actions (Android) launched

item.title: Claude — Free on all plans; memory import tool launched
item.description: Claude: Free on all plans; memory import tool launched
